news.title: Energy Transfer (ET) Expands Nederland Terminal With New Ethane And LPG Capacity
news.summary: Energy Transfer (NYSE:ET) announced a major expansion of its Nederland NGL Export Terminal, with the project targeting completion by 2029. The project includes an additional 240,000 barrels per day of ethane export capacity and 55,000 barrels per day of LPG capacity. New ship docks and expanded storage are planned, with NGL export capacity expected to reach industry leading levels once finished.
